instructions: Guess the word in {{tries}} tries. After each guess, the color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was to the word.
correctSpotInstructions: The letter W is in the word and in the correct spot.
wrongSpotInstructions: The letter L is in the word but in the wrong spot.
notInWordInstructions: The letter U is not in the word in any spot.
chainRuleInstructions: From the 2nd guess, a letter chains from your previous guess. The chained letter is auto-filled and locked.
chainPatternInstructions: The chain alternates: right → left → right → left → right, forming a snake pattern.
chainDeadEndInstructions: If the chained letter doesn't match the answer's position, the game ends early.
donateMonsterDrink: Buy the developer a Monster Energy!
aboutAuthorSentence: This is an open source word guessing game adapted to {{language}} by <3>{{author}}</3>.
aboutCodeSentence: Check out <1>the original code</1> by <3>Hannah Park</3> or have a look at <5>Aidan Pine's fork</5> and customize it for another language!
aboutDataSentence: The words for this game were sourced from <1>{{wordListSource}}</1>.
aboutOriginalSentence: You can also play the original  <1>here</1>
patchNote_customPuzzle_desc:
Create your own puzzle and share it with friends via URL!
Tap "Create" at the bottom to get started.
patchNote_donations_desc: New payment options have been added to the donation menu.
patchNote_kakaopay_desc: Donate via KakaoPay QR code or transfer link.
patchNote_tosspay_desc: Donate via Toss Pay QR code or transfer link.
patchNote_infoModal_desc:
The info modal now features tabs for each game mode.
Quickly find rules and details for Daily, Practice, Custom, and Create.
patchNote_subtitle_desc: Each game mode now displays a colored subtitle.
patchNote_flags_desc: The language selector now shows country flag emojis.
createPuzzleDescription:
Create a custom puzzle,
Share it with your friends!
dailyModeDesc:
A new puzzle is released every day at midnight (UTC).
All players solve the same word.
Your results are saved to statistics and can be shared.
practiceModeDesc:
Play unlimited games with random words.
Statistics are not saved, and sharing is not available.
Tap "Play Again" to start a new game.
practiceModeWarning: Refreshing the page will discard your current game and start a new word from scratch.
customModeDesc:
You are playing a puzzle created by {{questioner}}.
Custom game statistics are tracked separately from daily stats.
You can share your results.
createModeDesc:
Enter your name and type the word to guess using the keyboard.
The word must be a {{length}}-letter English word from the word list.
Press ENTER to copy the puzzle URL to your clipboard.
Share the URL with friends so they can solve your puzzle!
patchNote_calendar_desc:
View your daily records at a glance on a monthly calendar.
Track your streaks and share your monthly results!
patchNote_settings_desc: Added toggles for starting the week on Monday and excluding URL when sharing.
patchNote_i18nFix_desc: Fixed an issue where translation keys were briefly shown instead of text when opening the app in a background tab.
